zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Minshull於1342年出生在英國爾邱奇 明書爾時，她的父親Henry Minshull28歲，母親Tibota de Pulford24歲。她於1363年之前與Edmund Dutton在英國爾邱奇 明書爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年在英國英格蘭爾邱奇 明書爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Minshull于1342年出生在英国爾邱奇 明書爾时，她的父亲Henry Minshull28岁，母亲Tibota de Pulford24岁。她于1363年之前与Edmund Dutton在英国爾邱奇 明書爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年在英国英格兰爾邱奇 明書爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Minshull
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Minshall
meanings: English: habitational name from a pair of villages in Cheshire, on either side of the Weaver river, recorded Munschulf in medieval documents. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Mann, Monn + Old English scylfe ‘shelf, ledge’. Compare Minshew .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Minshull was born in 1342, in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England, her father, Henry Minshull, was 28 and her mother, Tibota de Pulford, was 24. She married Edmund Dutton before 1363, in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1387, in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Minshull est née en 1342, à Church Minshull, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Minshull, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Tibota de Pulford, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Dutton avant 1363, à Church Minshull, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1387, à Church Minshull, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Minshull 1342 in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Minshull 28 und ihre Mutter Tibota de Pulford 24. Sie hat vor 1363 in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England Edmund Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1387 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Minshull è nata il nel 1342 nel Church Minshull, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Henry Minshull, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Tibota de Pulford, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Dutton prima del 1363, nel Church Minshull, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1387, nel Church Minshull, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Minshull(이)가 1342년 영국 체실르 c후르치 민슈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Minshull(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tibota de Pulford(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1363년 이전 영국 체실르 c후르치 민슈에서 Edmund Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 c후르치 민슈에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Minshull родилась в 1342 г. в местности чурч миншулл, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Minshull было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Tibota de Pulford, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Dutton перед 1363 г. в местности чурч миншулл, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1387 г. в местности чурч миншулл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
